title: Cuneiform Tablet #0858: Early Dynastic Inventory
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a inventory document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a inventory document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Early Dynastic period. Inventory document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records inventory matters typical of Early Dynastic period administrative or literary practice.
